Conclusion.—Note the 6th lord aspects the house of

Chart No. 48.—Born on 20/21-10-1887 at about 3-10 a.m.

is frequently acquired by dint of hard labour. In the Navamsa,
Rahu is in the 2nd while 2nd lord is in the 12th. This indicates
loss due to the displeasure of the Government.
It has also been observed that Mars and the Moon in mutual
kendras give rise to something like Chandra-mangala Yoga.
The mutual disposition of the Moon and Jupiter in kendras is
known as Gajakesari Yoga. Here also the strength of the yoga to
produce its effects rests on the nature of the situation of the Moon
and Jupiter such as in exaltation, debilitation, inimical place, etc.
If Gajakesari Yoga occurs in the 12th, 6th, or 8th from Lagna, it
